readiness_claims.claim: The packet is limited to attended read-only review of account-scoped DevHub status information after the user completes login manually.
The worker must hand off if authentication prompts, CAPTCHA, MFA, account setup, payment, upload, scheduling, certification, or submission appears.

abort_conditions: Authentication challenge, CAPTCHA, MFA, or account creation appears.
Any upload, submit, certify, pay, purchase, schedule, cancel, withdraw, extension, or reactivation control is required.
The user asks the worker to operate outside read-only review.
